content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Sun, 15 Feb 2026 00:44:43 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 252 | Critical: 72 | High: 24 | Medium: 21 | Low: 135

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST] US army launches retaliatory strikes on dozens of ISIL targets in Syria (GDELT)
  [MIDDLE EAST] US , Iran to hold new round of nuclear talks in Geneva this week , Swiss government says (GDELT)
  [UKRAINE] US - Iran likely to hold nuclear deal talks on Feb 17 in Geneva (GDELT)
  [AFRICA] At least 6 , 000 killed in Sudan over 3 days , U . N . says (GDELT)
  [AFRICA] At least 6 , 000 killed over 3 days during RSF attack on Sudan el - Fasher , UN says (GDELT)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (59 events, 23 critical, 6 high):
    - US army launches retaliatory strikes on dozens of ISIL targets in Syria
    - US , Iran to hold new round of nuclear talks in Geneva this week , Swiss government says
    - Iranian FM says Europe replaced by Tehran  effective  regional friends in nuclear talks - Xinhua
  Ukraine/Russia (10 events, 4 critical, 2 high):
    - US - Iran likely to hold nuclear deal talks on Feb 17 in Geneva
    - The war dead pictured on banned Ukrainian athlete's helmet
    - Ukrainian slider's Olympics over as helmet appeal dismissed
  Europe (39 events, 14 critical, 2 high):
    - Russia’s Alexey Navalny killed by dart frog poison, European nations allege
    - Russia killed opposition leader Alexei Navalny using dart frog toxin, UK says
    - Two Britons among three dead in French Alps avalanche
  Indo-Pacific (45 events, 3 critical, 4 high):
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
    - Gilded Capability: Overinvestment and the Survivability Paradox
    - Russia’s Lavrov calls North Koreas nukes the key to its prosperity
  United States (6 events, 2 critical, 2 high):
    - US military used Anthropic’s AI model Claude in Venezuela raid, report says
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - Pentagon to deploy roughly 200 troops to Nigeria
  Global (66 events, 13 critical, 5 high):
    - Mark Carney joins hands with Canada opposition leader as he pays tribute to school shooting victims
    - FCAS may survive, but next-gen fighter negotiations all but dead: Industry source
    - University expels student who called for accountability over Hong Kong fire

Sources: GDELT, Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye, The Guardian, BBC World, BBC Europe, Breaking Defense, BBC Africa, Defense News, CISA Advisories, War on the Rocks, NK News, BBC Middle East, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, NYT World, BBC Asia, The Diplomat
